chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C. P. No. D –1576 of 2021 Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing 1. For order on CMA No.7219/21 2. For order on office objection no.4 3. For hearing of CMA No.6614/21 4. For hearing of main case Dated: 11.03.2021 Mr. Imtiaz Mansoor-ul-Haq Solangi for petitioners. ---- 1. Granted. 2. Deferred. 3-4. It is contended inter alia by the learned counsel for the petitioners that they were promoted to the posts of Junior Clerks (BPS-11) and posted to their respective place of posting accordingly, however, later on, their promotion in BPS-11 was recalled by the respondent-department vide letter dated 01.03.2019. They being aggrieved by and dissatisfied with the aforesaid decision filed their respective representations to the respondent-Secretary Education for redressal of their grievances vide letters dated 9.5.2019, 26.8.2019, 13.2.2020, and 17.3.2020. Finally, the respondent Regional Director Colleges Larkano vide letter dated 5.1.2021 recommended their case for reinstatement against the aforesaid posts of Junior Clerk (BPS-11). Learned counsel, in support of his contentions, relied upon the statement dated 8.3.2021 and argued that the post of Junior Clerk (BPS-11) could be filled by thirty percent by way of promotion from amongst the officials working in BPS- 1 to BPS-4. He relied upon the recruitment rules notified on 22.12.2020 and 26.02.2021. He also relied upon the office orders dated 29.5.2019 & 21.2.2021 and argued that the respondents have already promoted the non-teaching staff from BPS-1 to BPS-4 (College side) to the posts of Junior Clerk (BPS-11) and the case of petitioners is akin to their colleagues.

He relied upon the recruitment rules notified on 22.12.2020 and 26.02.2021. He also relied upon the office orders dated 29.5.2019 & 21.2.2021 and argued that the respondents have already promoted the non-teaching staff from BPS-1 to BPS-4 (College side) to the posts of Junior Clerk (BPS-11) and the case of petitioners is akin to their colleagues. He prays for notice. To appreciate the contentions of learned counsel for the petitioners, whether the post of Junior Clerk (BPS-11) could be filled amongst the officials working in BPS-1 to BPS-4 in Education Department, Government of Sindh, or otherwise. Let notice be issued to the respondents as well as to learned AAG for a date to be fixed by the office after two weeks. JUDGE JUDGE Nadir
